raw: This pass provides a 50% off discount on Boston Harbor Island Ferry tickets for up to 4 people. This pass is a digital discount code. You will receive the code via email after reserving this pass. You will submit the discount code when purchasing tickets online at www.bostonharborislands.org . The discount code can be used throughout the entire 2026 season, which is listed below: Georges Island May 15 - June 14: Thursdays through Sundays June 16 - September 1: every day Spectacle Island July 15 - September 1: every day September 4 - 21: Thursdays through Sundays September 26 - October 13: Fridays through Sundays Peddocks Island from Hingham June 15 - September 7: every day BUT Tuesdays September 10 - October 12: Thursdays through Sundays
